name: gpd-arxiv
description: Optional arXiv bridge for arxiv-mcp-server. Advertises the baseline upstream tools search_papers, download_paper, list_papers, and read_paper, forwards only tools exposed by the live upstream server, and adds GPD download_source for raw source archives.
prerequisites: Install GPD before enabling built-in MCP servers.

python_module.notes: Replace `${GPD_PYTHON}` with a Python >=3.11 interpreter that has GPD installed.

availability_condition: Available only when the optional Python module 'arxiv_mcp_server' is installed.
